provisions.exact_change: Repeal or terminate the named prior laws and preserve only the stated savings / no-revival rules. | Amend the cited national-security statutes to eliminate automatic clearances/access and to add the new oversight and retaliation protections. | Amend the Commerce Dispersal Act sections on commerce, trade, intellectual property, enforcement, and copyright functions as enacted.
provisions.evidence: "Conforming Amendments"
